column1: Synchronize the 'Chip Tray Photos' folder from Microsoft Teams to OneDrive
Select your synchronized OneDrive folder location
Set key folders to 'Always Keep on This Device' for offline access
You need to 'Sync' a SharePoint folder which contains the Chip Tray Photos folder.
Open Microsoft Teams and navigate to the channel containing the 'Chip Tray Photos' folder.
In the toolbar at the top, click 'Sync'. This will create a link in your File Explorer to the SharePoint location.
⚠️ Required: Set Folders for Offline Access
After sync completes, right-click these folders in OneDrive and select 'Always Keep on This Device':
Note: Initial download may exceed 100GB. Ensure sufficient disk space.
Once you have completed these steps, click 'Next'.
Look for: C:\Users\[YourName]\OneDrive - Fortescue\...\Chip Tray Photos
Please browse to select your synchronized 'Chip Tray Photos' folder.
